      HintName: GlobalStatus.g.cs,

// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
using System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis;

partial class GlobalStatus
{
    private static readonly Dictionary<int, GlobalStatus> _byValue = new Dictionary<int, GlobalStatus>()
    {
        [1] = Active,
        [2] = Inactive,
    };

    private static readonly Dictionary<string, GlobalStatus> _byName = new Dictionary<string, GlobalStatus>()
    {
        ["Active"] = Active,
        ["Inactive"] = Inactive,
    };

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets all values of GlobalStatus ordered by value.
    /// </summary>
    public static IReadOnlyCollection<GlobalStatus> GetAll() => _byValue.Values;

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the GlobalStatus instance from its value.
    /// </summary>
    public static GlobalStatus FromValue(int value)
    {
        if (_byValue.TryGetValue(value, out var result))
            return result;
        throw new InvalidOperationException($"No GlobalStatus with value {value} found.");
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the GlobalStatus instance from its name.
    /// </summary>
    public static GlobalStatus FromName(string name)
    {
        if (_byName.TryGetValue(name, out var result))
            return result;
        throw new InvalidOperationException($"No GlobalStatus with name '{name}' found.");
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Tries to get the GlobalStatus instance from its value.
    /// </summary>
    public static bool TryFromValue(int value, [NotNullWhen(true)] out GlobalStatus? result)
    {
        return _byValue.TryGetValue(value, out result);
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Tries to get the GlobalStatus instance from its name.
    /// </summary>
    public static bool TryFromName(string name, [NotNullWhen(true)] out GlobalStatus? result)
    {
        return _byName.TryGetValue(name, out result);
    }

}
